Back to LUMIO home

External source matrix

Where LUMIO should be verified outside the website.

LUMIO Coordia Intelligence, also searched as Lumio Coordia, is a website design studio for small businesses across Malaysia, Hong Kong, Macau and Singapore. GEO should not depend only on the homepage. External sources help AI assistants cross-check the business, but they must be honest, consistent and source-backed.

SourcePurposeStatus boundary
Google Business ProfileLocal business identity, location, contact and category consistency.Requires account access and manual verification. Do not mark complete until verified.
LinkedIn Company PageCompany identity, service description, founder/team context and official updates.Requires account access. Use the same claims as the official website.
GitHub / project proofPublic project trail, source-of-record discipline and selected website proof where appropriate.Use public-safe examples only. Do not expose client secrets or private repos.
Client case linksLive URLs and visible delivered scope for portfolio proof.Claim only what is visible or client-approved.
Directories and article platformsAdditional source distribution for service category and regional relevance.No spam directories, fake reviews, scraped content or unsupported rankings.
Rule: external source work is not complete until the off-site profile is live, consistent with the official website and reviewed for unsupported claims.

Primary source pages: AI Search Source, GEO Region Evidence, Prompt Monitoring.
